Following question consists of two statements

numbered (1) and (2). You have to decide

whether the data provided in the statements is

sufficient to answer the question.

A box contains Red, Black and Blue marbles.

What is the percentage of Blue marbles in the

box?

Statement 1: Percentage of Red marbles is 60%

of the total marbles.

Statement 2: Black marbles are 300% of the Blue

marbles.
